debug_info.goal:
case neg.inr
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
C : Error.Call n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
o : Error.maxOne n (C :: σ)
ra : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Caller
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n C σ o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n C σ o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_f : Error.eval n S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩

failed_attempts:
have : (b, false) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                simpa [eval] using (true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f)
              exact (Set.mem_diff_of_mem (Set.mem_diff_of_mem (by
                refine Or.inl ?_
                exact Set.mem_union_left _ this) (by
                  intro hyp
                  simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq, eval] at hyp
                  have := hyp S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl equiv_refl
                  simpa [eval, stubbornness] using this)) (by
                    intro hyp
                    rcases hyp with ⟨T, τ, hlen, D, hrole, hsel, hhas⟩
                    have : eval T τ (Has b (b, true)) := by
                      simpa [eval] using hhas
                    have hbT : T b = true := by
                      simpa [eval, stubbornness] using this
                    have hbS : S b = true := by
                      have := know_self (m := τ.1.length) (a := b) (S := S) (T := T) (σ := ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩)
                        (τ := τ.1) (h1 := by simp [OSequence.length]) (h2 := by simp [OSequence.length]) (by
                          have : equiv b (S, ⟨⟨σ, ⁻o⟩, by simp [OSequence.length]⟩) (T, ⟨τ.1, by simpa [OSequence.length] using τ.2⟩) := by
                            have : equiv b (S, ⟨⟨σ, ⁻o⟩, rfl⟩) (T, τ) := by
                              have := (equiv_Equivalence (n := n) (k := σ.length) (i := a)).2.2 equiv_refl hrole
                              exact False.elim (by
                                have := congrArg (fun r => r) hrole
                                simp [roleOfIn] at this)
                            simpa using this
                          exact this)
                      simpa [hbT] using this
                    cases hbS
            ·
              intro hb'
              have : (b, true) ∈ resultSet a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ := hb'
              have : eval S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ (Has a (b, true)) := by simpa [eval] using this
              have hb : S b = true := by
                simpa [eval, stubbornness] using this
              cases hb

simp [Error.eval] at hk
                  have : Error.equiv n (k := (⟨C :: σ, o⟩ : OSequence).length) a
                        (S, ⟨⟨C :: σ, o⟩, rfl⟩) (T, ⟨τ, same_len.symm⟩) := by
                    convert equ using 1 <;> simp
                  exact this)

exact not_a_knows (by
                have : Error.eval n T τ (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)) := by
                  simpa [eval] using not_in_callee
                exact this)
